blocks.text: Wærenskjold Targets Spring Classic Glory at Gent-Wevelgem

Saturday's marquee event belongs to the cobbles. Gent-Wevelgem is tailor-made for Norway's powerhouse sprinter Søren Wærenskjold — a rider built for this exact race. Jonas Abrahamsen and Markus Hoelgaard provide backup in a strong Norwegian contingent.
🚴 Gent-Wevelgem 2026 (In Flanders Fields) — Wærenskjold, Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard battle the classics at 11:00
⛳ Houston Open continues — Reitan & Ventura chasing the field; Paul Waring leads at -7 as the weekend rounds begin at 05:00
